Module 5
Bonuses…
• Free as part of your paid offer
• Help sell your course

• Addresses objections

What makes a great bonus?
• Fills a gap
Does PLF teach me how to
create a product?
What makes a great bonus?
• Is relevant
• Helps your positioning
• Expands/deepens the topic
What makes a great bonus?
• Shortcuts their results
• Helps them get the transformation faster
• Can lead to a future offer
• Makes them so excited to get the bonus that
they’re willing to buy the product just to get it

If it’s not essential to achieving
transformation, it’s a bonus!
Bonuses could take several different
formats…
• A personal consult or 1:1 call
• Q&A calls or group coaching
• A quick-start program
• A private community
Bonuses could take several different
formats…
• Done-for-you items (scripts, templates, etc.)

Bonuses could take several different
formats…
• A live event ticket
Bonuses could take several different
formats…

How to use bonuses
• If you segment your list when they opt-in, offer
specific bonuses for each segment

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
How to use bonuses
• Use the launch conversation to identify what else
to add during Open Cart (if needed)
When to use bonuses
• At time of Open Cart
• Be careful with ”fast action” bonuses
• In the Sales Video
• In Webinars or Live Interviews during Open Cart
When to use bonuses
• As you get closer to Cart Close
• One strategy is to add an additional bonus
during Open Cart week, then
• Another a few hours from Cart Close to
persuade last-minute buyers
• (Of course everyone gets everything regardless
of when they sign up)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
